scripts.bench:show-projects: NX_NO_CLOUD=true hyperfine --show-output --setup 'node ../packages/nx/dist/bin/nx.js reset' --warmup 1 --min-runs 5 --export-json results-show-projects.json 'node ../packages/nx/dist/bin/nx.js show projects --tui=false'
scripts.bench:cat-warm: NX_NO_CLOUD=true hyperfine --show-output --setup 'node ../packages/nx/dist/bin/nx.js reset' --warmup 1 --min-runs 5 --export-json results-cat-warm.json 'node ../packages/nx/dist/bin/nx.js run-many -t cat --tui=false'
scripts.bench:copy-warm: NX_NO_CLOUD=true hyperfine --show-output --setup 'node ../packages/nx/dist/bin/nx.js reset' --warmup 1 --min-runs 5 --export-json results-copy-warm.json 'node ../packages/nx/dist/bin/nx.js run-many -t copy --tui=false'
scripts.bench:build-warm: NX_NO_CLOUD=true hyperfine --setup 'node ../packages/nx/dist/bin/nx.js reset' --warmup 1 --min-runs 5 --export-json results-build-warm.json 'node ../packages/nx/dist/bin/nx.js run-many -t build --tui=true --tui-auto-exit'
